---
title: "Writing"
subtitle: "Essays on AI safety, biosecurity, and methodology"
description: "Long-form writing by Austin P. Morrissey on AI capability evaluations, biosecurity, and the philosophy of empirical science."
listing:
  - id: featured
    contents: "*.qmd"
    include:
      featured: true
    type: grid
    sort: "featured-order asc"
    grid-columns: 2
    image-height: "180px"
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, reading-time]
    field-display-names:
      reading-time: ""
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
  - id: all-writing
    contents: "*.qmd"
    exclude:
      filename: index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, subtitle, date, categories, reading-time]
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
    feed: true
    categories: cloud
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

These essays cross-post to my [Substack](https://austinpatrick.substack.com), where they reach a wider audience. The canonical version lives here, and Substack versions point back via canonical link.

::: {.column-margin}
*Subscribe via [RSS](/writing/index.xml) or [Substack](https://austinpatrick.substack.com/subscribe).*
:::

## Featured

::: {#featured}
:::

---

## Archive

::: {#all-writing}
:::
